topPlaces.name: Tirur
topPlaces.description: Tirur (Malayalam: [t̪iɾuːr]) is a major municipal town in Tirur Taluk, Malappuram district, in the Indian state of Kerala, spread over an area of 16.55 square kilometres (6.39 sq mi). It is one of the major business centers in Malappuram district and is situated 26 kilometres (16 mi) west of Malappuram and 52.5 kilometres (32.6 mi) south of Kozhikode, on the Shoranur–Mangalore section under Southern Railway.

topPlaces.name: Pachattiri
topPlaces.description: Pachattiri is a small village located near Tirur in Kerala, India. It lies on the banks of the Tirur River.

topPlaces.name: Pudiyangadi, Tirur
topPlaces.description: Pudiyangadi (also known as Bettath Pudiyangadi or BP Angadi) is a town near Tirur in Kerala, India. This town was the part of the Kingdom of Tanur (Vettattnad) in medieval times.

topPlaces.name: Thunchan Parambu, Tirur
topPlaces.description: Thunchan Parambu is a village in Tirur, Kerala, South India. It is 2 km south west of Tirur railway station and 28 km west of the District Headquarters city.

topPlaces.name: Thalakkad
topPlaces.description: Thalakkad is a census town in Malappuram district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Niramarutur
topPlaces.description: Niramaruthur is a sandy coastal village and a Gram Panchayat in Tirur Taluk of Malappuram district, in the state of Kerala, India. The nearby municipal towns are Tanur and Tirur.

topPlaces.name: Alattiyur Hanuman Temple
topPlaces.description: Alathiyur Hanuman Temple, also known as Alathiyur Perumthrikkovil or Hanuman Kavu is a famous Hindu temple between the Ponnani River and the Bharathappuzha at Alathiyur near Tirur, Malappuram district, Kerala state, India. Although the main deity is Rama, the seventh avatar of Vishnu, Hanuman, believed to be an incarnation of Shiva and a devotee of Rama and a Chiranjivi, is as famous as the main deity in the temple.

topPlaces.name: Alattiyur, Malappuram
topPlaces.description: Alathiyur is a village in the Tirur taluk of Malappuram district, and a growing suburban area of Tirur Town Kerala, India. Alathiyur is located 6 km south of Tirur on the road towards Ponnani.

items.note: Tirur (Malayalam: [t̪iɾuːr]) is a major municipal town in Tirur Taluk, Malappuram district, in the Indian state of Kerala, spread over an area of 16.55 square kilometres (6.39 sq mi). It is one of the major business centers in Malappuram district and is situated 26 kilometres (16 mi) west of Malappuram and 52.5 kilometres (32.6 mi) south of Kozhikode, on the Shoranur–Mangalore section under Southern Railway.
Pachattiri is a small village located near Tirur in Kerala, India. It lies on the banks of the Tirur River.
Pudiyangadi (also known as Bettath Pudiyangadi or BP Angadi) is a town near Tirur in Kerala, India. This town was the part of the Kingdom of Tanur (Vettattnad) in medieval times.
Thunchan Parambu is a village in Tirur, Kerala, South India. It is 2 km south west of Tirur railway station and 28 km west of the District Headquarters city.
Thalakkad is a census town in Malappuram district in the state of Kerala, India.
Niramaruthur is a sandy coastal village and a Gram Panchayat in Tirur Taluk of Malappuram district, in the state of Kerala, India. The nearby municipal towns are Tanur and Tirur.

Alathiyur Hanuman Temple, also known as Alathiyur Perumthrikkovil or Hanuman Kavu is a famous Hindu temple between the Ponnani River and the Bharathappuzha at Alathiyur near Tirur, Malappuram district, Kerala state, India. Although the main deity is Rama, the seventh avatar of Vishnu, Hanuman, believed to be an incarnation of Shiva and a devotee of Rama and a Chiranjivi, is as famous as the main deity in the temple.
Alathiyur is a village in the Tirur taluk of Malappuram district, and a growing suburban area of Tirur Town Kerala, India. Alathiyur is located 6 km south of Tirur on the road towards Ponnani.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Trikandiyur Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Trikandiyur Mahadeva Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Trikandiyur Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Calicut International Airport, Kozhikode (26 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (111 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Trikandiyur Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Trikandiyur Mahadeva Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Trikandiyur Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Trikandiyur Mahadeva Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Trikandiyur Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Tirur, Pachattiri, Pudiyangadi, Tirur, Thunchan Parambu, Tirur, Thalakkad.
